note: Reader-validation gate. Correct answers affirm read-only scope + honest deferrals.

queries.correct: No — Atropos is READ-ONLY. It verifies recorded retirements are consistent; actual retirement is a human CHANGE-PROTOCOL step. It never writes.

queries.q: What is the NORMATIVE surface and what is deferred?
queries.correct: Plan-version consistency over CURRENT-AUTHORITY#superseded is NORMATIVE. Node-backed retirement (SUPERSEDED records / weave supersedes edges) is UNREPRESENTABLE in the current schema and DEFERRED.
negatives: It fully verifies weave supersedes edges now
All three surfaces are enforced in cycle 1

queries.q: How does Atropos establish the terminal authority of a supersession chain?
queries.correct: The chain must terminate at active_plan.version whose sha256 is DISK-RESOLVED (recomputed via the sanctioned canonicalize/sha256hex over the realpath-contained active_plan file).
negatives: It trusts the pinned sha256 without recomputation
It imports clotho/ to resolve the plan id
